nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Project overview: vec0 virtual tables, install matrix for 8+ language ecosystems, sponsors, sample SQL usage.

nodes.name: bindings/rust/src/lib.rs
nodes.summary: Rust binding: declares extern sqlite3_vec_init from static lib sqlite_vec0; test registers it via sqlite3_auto_extension and checks vec_version().

nodes.name: bindings/rust/build.rs
nodes.summary: Build script compiling sqlite-vec.c with the cc crate, defining SQLITE_CORE, into lib sqlite_vec0.

nodes.name: bindings/python/extra_init.py
nodes.summary: Python helpers serialize_float32/serialize_int8 that struct.pack vectors into the raw-bytes format sqlite-vec expects.

nodes.name: benchmarks/micro/src/lib.rs
nodes.summary: Micro-benchmark helper init_vec() registering sqlite3_vec_init as an auto extension for rusqlite.

nodes.name: benchmarks/micro/build.rs
nodes.summary: Benchmark build script compiling ../../sqlite-vec.c into sqlite_vec0 via cc.

nodes.name: examples/sqlite3-cli/core_init.c
nodes.summary: core_init() hook auto-loading sqlite3_vec_init, used with SQLITE_EXTRA_INIT to statically build vec into the sqlite3 CLI.

nodes.name: examples/wasm/wasm.c
nodes.summary: sqlite3_wasm_extra_init() registering sqlite3_vec_init for browser/WASM builds of SQLite.

nodes.name: scripts/vendor.sh
nodes.summary: Downloads and unpacks the SQLite amalgamation (3.45.3, 2024) into vendor/ for local builds.

nodes.name: sqlite-dist.toml
nodes.summary: Distribution manifest: package metadata, MIT OR Apache-2.0 license, targets for GitHub releases, sqlpkg, spm, amalgamation, pip, npm, gem, datasette, sqlite-utils.

nodes.name: site/project.data.ts
nodes.summary: VitePress data loader exposing PROJECT name and VERSION read from the repo-root VERSION file.

nodes.name: site/package.json
nodes.summary: Docs site tooling: vitepress dev/build/preview scripts plus better-sqlite3, js-yaml, valibot dependencies for reference generation.

nodes.name: site/using/c.md
nodes.summary: Doc page: sqlite-vec is a single sqlite-vec.c/sqlite-vec.h pair, vendorable into C/C++ projects; amalgamation builds on Releases page.

nodes.name: benchmarks-ann/datasets/nyt-768/distill-model.py
nodes.summary: uv-style script distilling BAAI/bge-base-en-v1.5 to 768 PCA dims via model2vec for the nyt-768 ANN dataset.

nodes.name: SECURITY.md
nodes.summary: Security policy: report vulnerabilities privately by email to the author rather than public GitHub issues.

nodes.name: sqlite-vec extension
nodes.summary: Small, dependency-free vector search extension for SQLite; successor to sqlite-vss; runs anywhere SQLite runs.

nodes.name: vec0 virtual table
nodes.summary: Core query surface: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE ... USING vec0(...) stores embeddings and serves KNN queries; supports metadata, auxiliary, and partition key columns.

nodes.name: Vector element types
nodes.summary: Supported vector storage types: float32, int8, and binary (bit) vectors.

nodes.name: Single-file C core
nodes.summary: Entire implementation is one sqlite-vec.c plus sqlite-vec.h, vendorable and compilable anywhere; amalgamation builds published on releases.

nodes.name: Language bindings
nodes.summary: Official bindings/packages for Python, Node.js, Ruby, Go, Rust, Datasette, rqlite, sqlite-utils wrapping the same C core.

nodes.name: sqlite3_auto_extension registration
nodes.summary: Common integration pattern: pass sqlite3_vec_init to sqlite3_auto_extension so every new connection loads vec functions automatically.

nodes.name: sqlite3_vec_init entrypoint
nodes.summary: Single C ABI entrypoint exported by the extension; declared extern by Rust, C, and WASM consumers.

nodes.name: Examples subsystem
nodes.summary: Per-runtime demo apps (bun, node, python, rust, wasm, sqlite3 CLI) each depending on the published sqlite-vec package.

nodes.name: Micro benchmarks
nodes.summary: Criterion-based Rust micro-benchmark crate linking the C core directly for performance measurement.

nodes.name: ANN benchmark datasets
nodes.summary: benchmarks-ann datasets (e.g. nyt-768) built with distilled embedding models for approximate-nearest-neighbor evaluation.

nodes.name: VitePress docs site
nodes.summary: site/ holds the documentation site: getting-started, using-X pages, and guides (semantic search, hybrid search, RAG, arithmetic, performance).

nodes.name: sqlite-dist packaging
nodes.summary: Multi-target release pipeline driven by sqlite-dist.toml: one config fans out to pip, npm, gem, spm, sqlpkg, amalgamation, GitHub releases.

nodes.name: WASM/browser support
nodes.summary: The extension compiles into SQLite WASM builds via sqlite3_wasm_extra_init, enabling in-browser vector search.

nodes.name: Vector serialization format
nodes.summary: Vectors enter SQL as JSON text or a compact raw little-endian byte format; helper serializers produce the byte form.

nodes.name: Static CLI compilation
nodes.summary: SQLITE_EXTRA_INIT compile option injects an init hook so a custom sqlite3 CLI ships with vec built in.

nodes.name: Successor to sqlite-vss
nodes.summary: README states sqlite-vec is the successor project to sqlite-vss.

nodes.name: Pure C, zero dependencies
nodes.summary: README claims the extension is pure C with no dependencies, running on Linux/macOS/Windows, browsers via WASM, and Raspberry Pis.

nodes.name: Pre-v1 stability warning
nodes.summary: README warns sqlite-vec is pre-v1 and breaking changes are expected.

nodes.name: Mozilla Builders sponsorship
nodes.summary: README states the project is a Mozilla Builders project additionally sponsored by Fly.io, Turso, SQLite Cloud, and Shinkai.

nodes.name: Bindings compile the C core via cc
nodes.summary: Rust build scripts compile sqlite-vec.c with the cc crate into static lib sqlite_vec0 (bindings define SQLITE_CORE).

nodes.name: vec_version() smoke test
nodes.summary: Rust test opens an in-memory connection and asserts SELECT vec_version() returns a string starting with 'v'.

nodes.name: Float vectors pack as raw f32 bytes
nodes.summary: serialize_float32 uses struct.pack('%sf') to emit the raw-bytes vector format sqlite-vec expects; serialize_int8 does the same for signed bytes.

nodes.name: Vendored SQLite is 3.45.3
nodes.summary: vendor.sh fetches the 2024 sqlite-amalgamation-3450300 zip and unpacks it into vendor/.

nodes.name: Dual MIT OR Apache-2.0 license
nodes.summary: sqlite-dist.toml declares the package license as 'MIT OR Apache-2.0' with Alex Garcia as author.

nodes.name: nyt-768 uses a distilled bge model
nodes.summary: distill-model.py distills BAAI/bge-base-en-v1.5 with model2vec at pca_dims=768 and saves it for ANN dataset generation.
